entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: World's fifth economically most important cereal and a staple in semi-arid tropics

entities.name: AFRICA
entities.description: Region where sorghum is a staple crop

entities.name: ASIA
entities.description: Region where sorghum is a staple crop

entities.name: SEMI-ARID TROPICS
entities.description: Environmental condition where sorghum is primarily grown as a staple

entities.name: SORGHUM HALEPENSE
entities.description: Wild relative of Sorghum bicolor used to boost genetic gains

entities.name: WHOLE-GENOME RESEQUENCING
entities.description: Technique used to study genome-wide and intraspecific variation in sorghum populations

entities.name: SNPS
entities.description: Single nucleotide polymorphisms identified through whole-genome resequencing

entities.name: INDELS
entities.description: Insertions and deletions identified through whole-genome resequencing

entities.name: SVS
entities.description: Structural variants identified through whole-genome resequencing

entities.name: CNVS
entities.description: Copy number variants identified through whole-genome resequencing

entities.name: SBXSH
entities.description: Hybrid lines resulting from S. bicolor x S. halepense

entities.name: ROOT SYSTEM DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: Biological process mapped to private genes in SbxSh lines

entities.name: RPD1
entities.description: ROOT PRIMORDIUM DEFECTIVE 1 gene that exerts a direct effect on root growth and development

entities.name: RRG
entities.description: RETARDED ROOT GROWTH gene that exerts a direct effect on root growth and development

entities.name: ROOT GROWTH AND DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: Physical growth and development of the root system influenced by RPD1 and RRG

entities.name: PERENNIALITY
entities.description: Trait compliant with agroecological practices and climate change resilience

entities.name: AGROECOLOGICAL PRACTICES
entities.description: Agricultural practices compatible with the perenniality trait

entities.name: SUSTAINABLE AGRICULTURE
entities.description: Agricultural goal supported by the perenniality trait

entities.name: CLIMATE CHANGE RESILIENCE
entities.description: Ability to withstand climate change, supported by the perenniality trait
